name: @auto-repair-shop/auth-lambda
description: CPF-based authentication Lambda function for Auto Repair Shop

scripts.zip: cd dist && zip -r ../lambda.zip . && cd .. && zip -r lambda.zip node_modules -x 'node_modules/@types/*' 'node_modules/typescript/*' 'node_modules/eslint/*' 'node_modules/jest/*' 'node_modules/ts-jest/*'
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run zip
